atom_a.text: Architecture and training rules are fundamentally the SAME thing — different levels of optimization, each with its own context flow and update rate. The duality between design-time and run-time vanishes.

atom_b.text: A full GPT (tokenizer, autograd, transformer, Adam, training loop, inference) fits in 200 lines of dependency-free Python; LLMs reduce to a small set of irreducible algorithmic components.

atom_a.text: microGPT is the culmination of a decade of simplification (micrograd, makemore, nanogpt); the 200-line ceiling reflects an algorithmic compression limit that AI-coding-agent assistance cannot push lower without crossing into mere obfuscation.

atom_b.text: Evolutionary developmental biology supplies design principles for AI architectures via selection_pressure: minimal genome floors (JCVI-syn3.0 ~473 genes), morphogenetic fields as multi-scale competency architectures, horizontal gene transfer as cross-domain capability borrowing.

atom_a.text: The Erdos disproof was the AI bringing a tool (Golod-Shafarevich theorem) from FIELD A into FIELD B; this is exactly the cross-disciplinary analogical move that human paradigm shifts historically require. Frontier AI now does this autonomously.

atom_b.text: Evolutionary developmental biology supplies design principles for AI architectures via selection_pressure: minimal genome floors (JCVI-syn3.0 ~473 genes), morphogenetic fields as multi-scale competency architectures, horizontal gene transfer as cross-domain capability borrowing.

atom_a.text: RLMs reach effective context length about 2 orders of magnitude longer than base; 10M+ tokens on certain workloads, by trading context-window memory for code+recursion control.

atom_b.text: Deep learning of thermodynamic laws: energy_constraint axis. Information-theoretic capacity, phase transitions, free-energy minimization as inductive biases for learning systems.

atom_a.text: Verifiability thesis: AI is superhuman at code and fails at tasks like car-washing because the gradient of capability tracks the gradient of verifier-density; tasks with rich verifiers concentrate capability, tasks without verifiers stagnate.

atom_b.text: Evolutionary developmental biology supplies design principles for AI architectures via selection_pressure: minimal genome floors (JCVI-syn3.0 ~473 genes), morphogenetic fields as multi-scale competency architectures, horizontal gene transfer as cross-domain capability borrowing.

atom_a.text: In Prime Intellect's RLMEnv: the main RLM gets ONLY a Python REPL; subordinate LLMs get heavy tools (web search, file access). Capability segregation by tool budget is the safety + efficiency axis.

atom_b.text: Glasswing's launch partners span AWS, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorganChase, Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Palo Alto Networks — a market_clearing event in cyber defense coordination. Competitive labs aligning on shared verifier substrate.

atom_a.text: A GENERAL-purpose OpenAI reasoning model disproved Erdos's 1946 unit-distance conjecture using infinite class field towers and the Golod-Shafarevich theorem from algebraic number theory; tools from one field disproving a conjecture in another, never previously bridged on this problem.

atom_b.text: Superlinear returns are a feature of the world (fame, power, military victories, knowledge), not artifacts of rules people invented; understanding this concept changes how an ambitious person allocates attention.

atom_a.text: OpenAI is positioning its model capability as a force on the defender side of the asymmetric cyber landscape; AI capability scales asymmetrically and the policy choice is which side to subsidize.

atom_b.text: Market-making mechanisms for multi-agent LLM safety: market_clearing axis, prediction markets and bidding auctions as decentralized aggregation, mechanism design for incentive-compatible coordination between agents.

atom_a.text: Aalto researchers introduced a quantum-inspired algorithm that handles massive non-periodic systems (e.g., >1e15 numbers for quasicrystals) on classical hardware; the boundary between classical and quantum tractability is moving via algorithmic, not hardware, advances.

atom_b.text: A full GPT (tokenizer, autograd, transformer, Adam, training loop, inference) fits in 200 lines of dependency-free Python; LLMs reduce to a small set of irreducible algorithmic components.

atom_a.text: Nested Learning treats AI not as a single program but as a system of nested learning processes that update at DIFFERENT RATES; architecture and training rules are unified as different levels of optimization.

atom_b.text: Evolutionary developmental biology supplies design principles for AI architectures via selection_pressure: minimal genome floors (JCVI-syn3.0 ~473 genes), morphogenetic fields as multi-scale competency architectures, horizontal gene transfer as cross-domain capability borrowing.

atom_a.text: Flatiron Institute CCQ team used tensor-network compression to solve a quantum-physics problem previously claimed to be quantum-computer-only; mathematical compression of wave functions defeats quantum supremacy in this domain.

atom_b.text: The proof's significance: a non-specialized model, not one trained on math, found the cross-field bridge. The capability is reasoning-locus-agnostic; it doesn't reside in the math-tuned head, it resides in the general substrate.

atom_a.text: Jagged intelligence: LLMs trained with RLVR spike in capability near verifiable domains (math, code) and crater elsewhere; the performance landscape is shaped by the distribution of verifier coverage, not by smooth generalization.

atom_b.text: Market-making mechanisms for multi-agent LLM safety: market_clearing axis, prediction markets and bidding auctions as decentralized aggregation, mechanism design for incentive-compatible coordination between agents.

atom_a.text: Mythos was WITHHELD because no company has safeguards strong enough; the release decision is now contingent on policy + partner infrastructure, not just model evaluation. The release threshold itself is becoming the alignment substrate.

atom_b.text: Market-making mechanisms for multi-agent LLM safety: market_clearing axis, prediction markets and bidding auctions as decentralized aggregation, mechanism design for incentive-compatible coordination between agents.

atom_a.text: Opus 4.6 enabled 1M-token context windows, sufficient to process entire corporate document libraries; the working-memory ceiling moved from chapter-level to corpus-level in a single release step.

atom_b.text: Deep learning of thermodynamic laws: energy_constraint axis. Information-theoretic capacity, phase transitions, free-energy minimization as inductive biases for learning systems.

atom_a.text: Microsoft's MDASH uses model-agnostic bespoke AI agents per vulnerability class; cybersec architecture is fragmenting into per-class agent specialists, not monolithic models.

atom_b.text: Evolutionary developmental biology supplies design principles for AI architectures via selection_pressure: minimal genome floors (JCVI-syn3.0 ~473 genes), morphogenetic fields as multi-scale competency architectures, horizontal gene transfer as cross-domain capability borrowing.

atom_a.text: Start-up readiness in adolescents is built by getting good at technology, working on hard projects you enjoy, and developing taste for what's broken in the world.

atom_b.text: Evolutionary developmental biology supplies design principles for AI architectures via selection_pressure: minimal genome floors (JCVI-syn3.0 ~473 genes), morphogenetic fields as multi-scale competency architectures, horizontal gene transfer as cross-domain capability borrowing.

atom_a.text: Next-latent-prediction transformers converge to BELIEF STATES — compressed history representations sufficient for prediction — formally bridging transformer LM and world-model architectures via belief-state theory.

atom_b.text: 2026 likely brings systems that figure out novel insights; 2027 likely brings robots that act in the real world. The timeline locks cognition before embodiment.

atom_a.text: GPT-5.5 cuts hallucinations 60% vs GPT-5.4 while keeping per-token latency constant; the improvement is concentrated in long-context reasoning, terminal/coding, and uncertainty calibration, not in raw token throughput.

atom_b.text: Deep learning of thermodynamic laws: energy_constraint axis. Information-theoretic capacity, phase transitions, free-energy minimization as inductive biases for learning systems.

atom_a.text: RLVR offered high capability/$ ratio, gobbling compute that was originally intended for pretraining; the training-stack mass-balance shifted away from pretraining toward verifier-bounded RL.

atom_b.text: Deep learning of thermodynamic laws: energy_constraint axis. Information-theoretic capacity, phase transitions, free-energy minimization as inductive biases for learning systems.

atom_a.text: Once a population can offload writing to AI, the fraction who write declines, and with it the fraction who think in the structured way writing imposes; this is an energy_constraint outcome on collective cognition.

atom_a.text: Hierarchical Causal Latent State Machines separate object representations and maintain multi-scale temporal dynamics; flat latent world models lose causal structure by collapsing temporal scales.

atom_b.text: Evolutionary developmental biology supplies design principles for AI architectures via selection_pressure: minimal genome floors (JCVI-syn3.0 ~473 genes), morphogenetic fields as multi-scale competency architectures, horizontal gene transfer as cross-domain capability borrowing.

atom_a.text: First known AI-developed 2FA-bypass zero-day for mass exploitation appears (May 2026). The offensive-side capability curve crosses an economically meaningful threshold; AI-assisted attacks are now a mass-market phenomenon, not lab demo.

atom_b.text: OpenAI is positioning its model capability as a force on the defender side of the asymmetric cyber landscape; AI capability scales asymmetrically and the policy choice is which side to subsidize.

atom_a.text: OpenAI's first decade taught that being wrong about strange things publicly is a survival skill; the company is OK with returning to that state when superintelligence sounds science-fictional.

atom_b.text: Persistent people are attached to points high in the decision tree; obstinate people are attached to first-formulated low-level details. The persistent prune branches, the obstinate spray 'don't give up' over the whole tree.

atom_a.text: OpenAI and Google align on C2PA and SynthID standards in 2026 — a turning point for content provenance. Competing labs converge on a shared verifier substrate; market_clearing through cooperation, not competition.

atom_b.text: Output increases faster than input in fields with exponential growth and thresholds; the linear 'you get out what you put in' lesson taught to children is empirically wrong outside structured tests.

atom_a.text: JUPITER (Europe's first exascale supercomputer) simulated 50-qubit universal quantum computer for the first time; classical simulation of quantum systems is tracking quantum hardware capacity at exascale.

atom_b.text: Output increases faster than input in fields with exponential growth and thresholds; the linear 'you get out what you put in' lesson taught to children is empirically wrong outside structured tests.

atom_a.text: Content provenance is enforced via three composable layers: C2PA manifest (origin metadata), SynthID watermark (durable per-image signal), public verifier (open verification tool). No single layer is robust; the architecture is multi-layered ecosystem coordination.

atom_b.text: Market-making mechanisms for multi-agent LLM safety: market_clearing axis, prediction markets and bidding auctions as decentralized aggregation, mechanism design for incentive-compatible coordination between agents.

atom_a.text: Claude Design lets users collaborate with Claude to create visual outputs (designs, prototypes, slides). The LLM's modality boundary is being pushed into the design substrate — the cognitive substrate is becoming graphical, not just textual.

atom_b.text: Writing is to thinking as the gym is to physical strength: before the industrial revolution manual labor made most people strong; afterward strength only survives by deliberate practice.

atom_a.text: OpenAI is now confident it knows how to build AGI as traditionally understood; the aim now extends to superintelligence proper, with superintelligent tools as a force-multiplier on scientific discovery.

atom_b.text: NeuroAI bridges neuroscience and AI on capability gaps: cognitive_function axis, biologically-plausible architectures, brain-organoid LLM curricula. AI capability gaps map onto evolved cognitive substrates.
